raw_consumer_statement: On XXXX  XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX suffered an outage for over XXXX hours. During this unannounced outage without being aware of the situation I've paid goods at XXXX store in the amount of {$XXXX} XXXX hours later my credit card was charged XXXX times this amount. Their fraud department failed to block my card despite charges being duplicated every XXXX minutes. So far charges have been posted and no one has resolved issue of duplicated charges. Stayed on the phone with XXXX for over 3 hours and no resolution yet.
